title: Dorridge Hill overhead line (JO/FOIN E4L5), S37 consent Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  25 June 2025  Location   Dorridge HillNew Forest National Park   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
